notes: Save states: a full copy of your logbook is now captured automatically before every risky step - pulling the cloud copy over this device, pushing over the cloud, restoring a backup, roster and experience imports, and duplicate removal - plus one automatic state per day.

Picked the wrong sync option? Settings, Export/Import & Sync now has a Save States list - restore any of the last 15 states with one tap. Restoring is itself reversible, because the current state is saved first.
